TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-love-story-zhuang

S.FORM: pan no moso cihi ci oko no hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個男孩。
There was a boy.

S.FORM: moso n'a na'no kaebʉ ho mo uh no tonalisi ho noepohʉ na oko no mamespingi ho pespak'i.
S.TRANSL: （他）喜歡去隔壁和一個女孩一起玩。
(He) liked to go to his neighbor and played with a girl.

S.FORM: ina oko no mamespingi moso n'a na'no kaebʉ emʉm'ʉ no bʉvnʉ mav'ov'o ci bʉvnʉ.
S.TRANSL: 那女孩非常喜歡種花，各式各樣的花。
The girl liked to grow flowers very much, all kinds of flowers.

S.FORM: ina nia nana to'tohʉ no oko no mamespingi osi n'a la eainca ta'u la peongcʉngci no mo mav'ov'o ci bʉvnʉ 'e pahpaesa ta maemoemo.
S.TRANSL: 女孩心裡想，我要在家家戶戶旁邊種各式各樣的花。
The girl thought that “I would grow all kinds of flowers around every house.

S.FORM: moh cu la sio bankake.
S.TRANSL: 他們就長大了。
(They) therefore grew up.

S.FORM: 'iama osi la ʉmnʉa no oko no hahocngʉ na mamespingi.
S.TRANSL: 出人意料的男孩愛上了女孩。
Unexpectedly, the girl was loved by the boy.

S.FORM: moh cu la maica mimimio XpoteliX ma te pasunaeno na 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣,(他們) 一起玩，那個男孩竟然還唱歌。
It was like this, (they) played, and unexpectedly the boy would sing.

S.FORM: 'iama lasi s'a ʉmnʉa ho osi ta'lʉi no oko no mamespingi na mo con ci pasunaeno.
S.TRANSL: 出乎意料的 （他）喜歡那女孩，那女孩聽了那首歌。
Unexpectedly,(he) loved the girl, and the girl heard a song.

S.FORM: osi cu pasunae moh cu asngʉcu pasunaeno maita'e.
S.TRANSL: (他)就一直這樣唱。
(He) just kept singing like this.

S.FORM: te mainenu moh cu atavei mi'usnu no oko no mamespingi 'e oko no hahocngʉ ho eainca.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼的後來男孩終於向女孩說，
Somehow the boy finally turned to the girl and said,

S.FORM: 'a ma te'o vcongʉ su?.
S.TRANSL: "跟我結婚好嗎？"
"May I marry you?"

S.FORM: eh moh cu maica.
S.TRANSL: 就像這樣。
Just like this.

S.FORM: isi cu engha ho eainca ma te'o vcongʉsu.
S.TRANSL: 他就說, "跟我結婚好嗎?"
He just says, "may I marry you?"

S.FORM: osi cu eaeza ʉmnʉa no oko no mamespingi.
S.TRANSL: 那女孩也喜歡他。
The girl also liked (him).

S.FORM: mici nana mipeohʉ mi'unu no peohna manci nana.
S.TRANSL: （他/他們）好像往下看。
(He/They) looked downward.

S.FORM: teolʉ no mo eon no eon no aaskiti no va'hʉ ci oko no mamespingi ho mongsi.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼有一個女孩在河邊哭。
Somehow (they) saw a girl who was at the side of the river and cried.

S.FORM: ihe cu nana usa ho aiti ho tuocosi ho eainca manci s'a ac'o mongsi si eainca no oko no mamespingi 'a mio eon ta va'hʉ ho tufku.
S.TRANSL: 女孩說，"我在河邊洗衣服"。
The girl said, "I washed clothes by the river."

S.FORM: isi hafa to chumu 'o mo coni ci yʉsʉ'u.
S.TRANSL: "河水帶走我一件衣服"。
"Water took away one of my clothes."

S.FORM: os'o na'na ucia ivaha eaa.
S.TRANSL: "我很想要把（它）拿回來"。
"I wanted to get it back very much."

S.FORM: maene 'o oko no hahocngʉ isi cu aupciva peobanga 'e yʉsʉ ho.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩於是趕快去追那被水帶走的衣服。
The boy hence in a hurry chased the clothes carried away by the water, and,

S.FORM: tasvoveia 'e isi hafa ta chumu ci ci yʉsʉ ci moso ngohcu.
S.TRANSL: 拿回被水帶走漂走的的衣服。
took back the clothes which had been taken away by the water.

S.FORM: 'oko no mamespingi ina 'e 'oko no mamespingi ci moso tufku isi ʉmnʉa 'e hahocngʉ eainca 'a os'o na'no ʉmnʉa na su.
S.TRANSL: 那個洗衣服的女孩喜歡上那男孩，並且說，我很喜歡你。
The girl who washed clothes loves the boy and says, "I love you very much."

S.FORM: 'o la na'no kaebʉ ho mo emʉm'ʉ to bʉvnʉ ko'ko eno o'a te'o tiova na su.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個很愛種花的。因此我不會接受妳。
"The one who always likes growing flowers very much. Therefore, I will not accept you."

S.FORM: te'o ec'ʉha tan'e.
S.TRANSL: 我就說到這裡。
I just stop here.
